narrative:
Precinct White Cottage (precinct in Muskingum County) has 774 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.3 percentage points.
